raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX a fraudulent charge for {$120.00} appeared on my statement from Barclays. They were notified of this charge and said they would investigate which led to them to a false conclusion in a XX/XX/year> letter I received which stated based on information available have concluded that the transaction is not fraudulent. 

Not only is this wrong but Barclays let a card that was stopped early XXXX by the bank to process this transaction when it should have been denied
